task_completion.description: Navigate to the Emoncms admin panel to gather system information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to 'http://localhost/admin' displaying Emoncms system information (versions for Emoncms, MySQL, PHP, and statuses for Redis, MQTT).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Emoncms Feeds and Inputs pages to gather item counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the Emoncms Feeds and Inputs pages, allowing the agent to count the number of listed items.

task_completion.description: Create the system health report file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, mousepad) or terminal command being used to create or edit a file specifically named '/home/ga/system_health_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Record the gathered versions and statuses in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the report file show the keys EMONCMS_VERSION, MYSQL_VERSION, PHP_VERSION, REDIS_STATUS, and MQTT_STATUS, each followed by their respective gathered values.

task_completion.description: Record the gathered feed and input counts in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the report file show the keys FEED_COUNT and INPUT_COUNT, each followed by an integer value (FEED_COUNT should be approximately 6).

integrity.description: Verify the agent gathered data by visually inspecting the web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen navigating the Emoncms web interface in a browser to find the information, rather than hallucinating values or using terminal scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the reported values match the source of truth.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed into the text report must match the actual values visible on the Emoncms web pages in the preceding screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the report follows the exact requested format.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file must contain exactly one key-value pair per line in the format 'KEY: <value>', without any conversational filler, markdown formatting, or extra text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The report must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/system_health_report.txt'. The environment contains synthetic seeded data with approximately 6 feeds (acceptable tolerance ±1) and a corresponding number of inputs (acceptable tolerance ±2). The minimum passing score for the task is 70.
